implementation_scope.dirty_worktree_note: The UX Lab workspace was already broadly dirty. The source changes for this slice are in the Tau chat view and shared chat shell; package metadata also contains unrelated pre-existing dependency drift and must not be staged wholesale without review.

what_changed: Tau UX Lab route now renders a collapsible proof rail next to a side-by-side xterm TUI mirror and Watch-style chat pane.
The TUI mirror uses @xterm/xterm and @xterm/addon-fit instead of a styled card list.
The proof rail and TUI/chat split panes are horizontally resizable and persist widths in localStorage.
The chat and TUI mirror read the same streaming turn state, so a single message updates both the chat process trace and terminal-style mirror.
Tau-specific chat mode labels replace generic Compliance/Persona labels with Evidence and Embry voice, while retaining Lucide Shield and Mic icons.

focused_tests.command: cd /home/graham/workspace/experiments/pi-mono/packages/ux-lab && npx vitest run src/components/tau/TauChatView.test.ts src/components/tau/tauAgentHandoff.test.ts src/components/tau/tauPeerStatus.test.ts

proves: The live UX Lab #tau route renders the Tau proof rail, xterm-backed TUI mirror, and Watch-style chat side by side.
The proof rail and TUI/chat panes can be resized by dragging the live handles.
Focused Tau UX Lab tests and TypeScript checks passed after the xterm/resizable-pane slice.
The chat and TUI mirror share the same in-browser Tau turn state for the exercised message path.
does_not_prove: The xterm pane is connected to a real Tau PTY process.
Fresh live GitHub mutation from this exact UI run.
That unrelated dirty dependency changes in pi-mono are safe to commit.

next_stop_condition: Before claiming production readiness, connect the xterm pane to a real Tau process or receipt stream, isolate the UX Lab dependency metadata, and run a fresh same-message browser proof after any further UI edits.
